FISSION.description: Explosions from your Exploding ID are twice as big and twice as strong.

EXPLOSIVE_IMPACT.description: Exploding gives an additional chance to deal [neutral]300% Main Attack damage in a radius of 5 blocks upon killing an enemy.

MAGNET.description: Pulls items dropped by mobs towards you.

PLAGUE.description: Poisoned mobs spread their poison to nearby mobs.

HAWKEYE.description: Arrow Hurricane becomes a condensed stream of 25 arrows, dealing [neutral]45%, [thunder]6%, and [air]6% each.

GREED.description: Picking up emeralds heals you and nearby players for 8% max health.

GUARDIAN.description: Devout Union gains +20% damage redirection and +4 radius.

HERO.description: While under 50% maximum health, nearby allies gain 15% bonus damage and defence.

ALTRUISM.description: Nearby players gain 100% of the health you gain from Health Regen and Life Steal.

ARCANES.description: 25% chance for spells to cost no mana when casted.

ROVINGASSASSIN.description: Vanish will no longer block mana and health regeneration.

MADNESS.description: Casts a random spell of your class every 3 seconds.

LIGHTWEIGHT.description: You no longer take fall damage.

SORCERY.description: 25% chance for spells and attacks to cast a second time at no additional cost.

RALLY.description: Cleansing Breeze heals you for 15% and allies for 20%, but Charge becomes harmless.

CHERRY_BOMBS.description: Turns Smoke Bomb into firecrackers that fly farther, tighter, and deal [neutral]100%, [earth]30%, [fire]30%, and [air]30% instantly.

FREERUNNER.description: When your sprint bar is under 30% full, increase your sprint speed by +150%.

PEACEFUL_EFFIGY.description: Your Totem will last twice as long.

FURIOUS_EFFIGY.description: Totem effects are twice as fast, but duration is halved.

GRAVITYWELL.description: Meteor has increased blast radius and pulls enemies instead.

DESC_SNOWYSTEPS.description: Leaves a trail of snow behind you.

GEOCENTRISM.description: Aura radiates from you instead of your Totem and can be cast any time.

TEMBLOR.description: Bash gains +1 Area of Effect and is 0.05s faster.

RECKLESS_ABANDON.description: Sacrifice War Scream's defense bonus to give Tempest [earth]+5%, [fire]+15%, [air]5% and 3 extra hits.

ALTEREGO.description: Awakened can be activated after saving 40% less mana, but its duration is reduced by 25%.

FOREST_BLESSING.description: Your hound gains 50% more movement speed, attack speed and vision. Arrow Bomb's damage is reduced by [neutral]-30%.

SOUL_EATER.description: Devour and Harvester grant double mana. Decreases maximum marks by 1.

STRINGS_OF_FATE.description: Your puppets have a lifetime of 3 seconds and deal 50% increased damage with attacks and explosions.

ESCAPE_ROUTE.description: Frenzy and Time Dilation charge twice as fast but also decay twice as fast.

DIVINE_HONOR.description: Increases the bonus from Radiance by 5%. Bash deals [earth]-15% per hit.

GENTLE_GLOW.description: Orphion's Pulse restores 5% more max health per pulse, but heals at a slower rate.

PERFECT_RECALL.description: Memory Recollection speeds up Chaos Explosion by 0.1s per spell but increases Chaos Explosion's mana bank requirement by 30.

JUGGLE.description: Mutilate adds an additional 12 hits. All hits are reduced by [neutral]-10%.

GRUESOME_KNOTS.description: Bleeding and Twisted Tether deal double damage, but Bleeding duration is reduced.

COAGULATE.description: Blood Connection and Eldritch Call's teleports launch you further and higher.

DEADWEIGHT.description: Totem's horizontal velocity is greatly increased at the cost of vertical movement.

EXPUNGE.description: When using Heal, cast one instant pulse that heals 15% of your max health.

LUNGE.description: Hop and Leap's horizontal velocity is greatly increased.

WINDSURF.description: Righting Reflex has 75% reduced fall speed, lasts twice as long, and is affected stronger by movement speed.

HELLFIRE.description: Bash is replaced by a single hit, gaining +3 radius and dealing [neutral]+85%, [earth]+10%, and [fire]+60%. Boiling Blood's cooldown is set to 2s, gains [neutral]+40%, [fire]+50%, and burns twice as fast for 1s, but can't slow.

NAPALM.description: Fire Creep increases Arrow Bomb damage by [fire]+15%, but deals 15 times the self-damage and lowers velocity. Scorched Earth radius is increased and deals [neutral]+65%.

TWISTING_THREADS.description: Tangled Traps ropes gain +1 range, can overlap up to 3 times, and deal [neutral]65%. Gain +12 traps with 66% duration that cannot be triggered by enemies.

LIFESTREAM.description: Blood Sorrow has 4 times the damage and overhealth, but its duration is shortened by 75%.

FIXATE.description: Distortion decays at a halved rate and Devitalize effects are doubled. However, Distortion effects on abilities are reduced by 40% and Meteor Shower now requires +50% Distortion per Meteor.

INSOLUBLE.description: Dissolution now lasts 2.5 seconds, but grants only 35% resistance.

EFFLORESCENCE.description: Serpent's Garden now centers to where you land with Swan Dive. Damage of Swan Dive, Serpent's Garden and Jasmine Bloom are distributed across all elements.

FIND_THYSELF.description: Masquerade now grants 75 Mana after switching between Masks 3 times.

METEOR_CRASH.description: Burning Sigil gains +6 radius and deals double the damage, but lasts half as long.

PERILOUS_FLARE.description: Pyrokinesis moves much slower, but has an increased Area of Effect and [neutral] +50%.

TOTEMIC_FUSE.description: Totemic Smash deals [neutral]+40%, [earth]+90%, [thunder]+90%, and [fire]+60% at the cost of half of Totem's duration.

SUBLIMATION.description: Totemic Shatter heals 75% of Regeneration's usual amount at the cost of 2 blocks of radius.

HURRICANES_EYE.description: Violent Vortex applies 2 marks to every enemy it hits.

FALLOUT.description: Bomb Arrow gains +7.5 range, [fire]+50%, severely increased recoil, and [neutral]25% self-damage.

SEEKING_MODULE.description: Homing Shots track towards nearby enemies much more aggressively.

PARAGON.description: Shield Strike deals [neutral]600% damage. Mantle of the Bovemist's cooldown is reduced by 15s, but is limited to one shield charge.

LUSTRATE.description: Heal restores health at a slower rate, but Searing Light deals [water]+150%.

ROCK_SHIELD.description: Arrow Shield's defense is increased by 10%, but its number of charges is reduced by 1.

LAST_RESORT.description: Bloodlust has doubled corrupted scaling and knockback, but deals [neutral]-200% [fire]-120%.

LOCKDOWN.description: Meteor will snap onto a target in range, regardless of aim.

RUSTED_ICHOR.description: Boiling Blood cooldown is reduced by 0.5s and inflicts 40% slowness, but deals no damage.

FRENETIC_SPIRIT.description: Guardian Angels damage is set to 10%, but shoot 40% faster and last 5 times longer. Frenzy's cap is increased by 55.

DISPLACE.description: Etheric Slash deals massive knockback to enemies hit by Teleport.

TACKLE.description: Flying Kick deals much more knockback and increases Collide damage by an additional [neutral]150%, [thunder]60%, and [fire]10%.

FLURRY_OF_BLOWS.description: Turn Double Slice into a 10-hit pummeling of 16% damage per hit.

EVERSHOT.description: Arrow Hurricane becomes a consistent, straight stream of arrows with a slower fire rate, dealing greater knockback and triple damage per arrow. Additionally, Arsenal Synergy requires 10 less arrows for each flint arrow.

POWER_FIST.description: Striking enemies with an empty hand greatly knocks them back.

VEDETTE.description: Focus gets +10% damage per stack, but caps at 2. Crepuscular Ray can be cast at 2 Focus with decreased Focus drain, launching you into the air and immobilizing you.

HEAT_SHIMMER.description: Foul Play will no longer slay a Mirror Clone and will still provide its effects, but Mirror Clone count is reduced to 1. Tricks application is increased by 50%.

VITRIOL.description: Uncontainable Corruption decreases Corrupted duration by 75% and gives drastically more damage, but disables Enraged Blow. Massacre adds 5 times as much corruption.

FAUSTIAN_GAMBIT.description: Frog Dance triggers once with increased vertical velocity and knockback, and deals [thunder]+400%.

METHODICAL.description: Initiator's reset time is reduced by 75%. Arrow Bomb area damage is halved, but direct hit damage is doubled.

PUNISHMENT.description: Reflected damage blinds enemies for 1s and makes them 10% more vulnerable to attacks for 3s.

ERGOSPHERE.description: Storm Dance instead lets your Totems pull enemies within their radius. Totem duration is decreased.

INVERSION.description: Teleport will grant you 3 seconds of levitation.

WORMHOLE.description: Last Laugh instead casts Meteor. Malicious Mockery causes Meteor to apply 13 Trick stacks.

PIONEERS_ECHO.description: Phantom Ray deals two bursts of [neutral] 150%, [water] 60% over 1 second. Decimator's increase and cap are raised to 140% and Quick Draw's activation threshold is decreased to 2.

DAUNTLESS_INFERNO.description: Courage casts a series of 5 infernos that expand after the last, dealing [fire]150% each, and grants 20% resistance instead of a damage boost.

SUPERCONDUCTOR.description: Chain Lightning channels three massive lightning bolts through you, arcing to enemies within 8 blocks for [thunder]270% and stunning them for 1s. You take 10% more damage for 4s.

SCARCE_COMFORT.description: Freestream Flow becomes slightly stronger and lasts indefinitely.

BRACHIATE.description: Grappling Hook has 25% increased range and increased velocity.

PHOENIXBORN.description: Health Regeneration is increased by 0.75% for every 1% Health missing.

SUN_EATER.description: Failing to backstab an enemy from behind blinds them for 0.5s and slows them by 20% for 5s.

SELFSUFFICIENT.description: Powder Specials can no longer be charged manually, but accumulate 8% charge every second.

ORBITAL_CHAIN.description: Chain Lightning hits slower, rebounds, adds 6 chains, and pulls mobs closer for a [neutral]8000% explosion spell.

CANNULATE.description: Sacrificial Shrine costs -5 Blood Pool to cast and health drain is halved.

INTANGIBLE.description: The knockback you take is drastically reduced, and reflected damage deals large knockback.

EARTHEN_SPLINTER.description: Quake channels nature energy into a powerful root, travelling underground and emerging under the nearest mob for [neutral]1200%.

TROLL_BARGE.description: Quake allows you to charge forth, dealing [neutral]80% and [earth]20% to any mobs hit, and ending with a powerful stomp for [neutral]400% and [earth]150%. This will leave you vulnerable.

COMBO_STOMP.description: Landing directly on an enemy with Fierce Stomp sends you back into the air and resets Escape.

TIDAL_DRIFT.description: Flying Kick will instead send you forwards. This effect is limited to once per Charge cast.

SPACE_GLIDE.description: Lacerate performs a single horizontal jump and slash, dealing [neutral]400%.

REALITY_REVISION.description: Phasing Beam instead makes Twain's Arc explode upon hitting an enemy, dealing its damage in a 5 block radius. Twain's Arc now has extreme recoil.

WORMHOLE_2.description: Teleport will grant you 3 seconds of levitation.

FAN_THE_HAMMER.description: Arrow Storm becomes a single stream of 6 high-powered arrows that deal [neutral]90% and [thunder]35%.

HEARTBEAT.description: Arrow Shield is set to 2 charges but deals doubled damage. Arrow Wall instead triples Arrow Shield damage and doubles Guardian Angels ammo.

SPECTRAL_MEMORY.description: Ghostly Trigger lasts until landing, but no longer increases attack speed. Its cooldown is reduced by 33%.

MANA_SURGE.description: Curse instead releases a calming wave with a radius of 8 blocks. Allies affected will have their Mana Regen and Mana Steal are increased by 25% for 6s.

DESPERATE_MEASURES.description: Walk Speed increases by 1% and Jump Height increases by 2% for every 1% hp missing.

PIROUETTE.description: Dancing Blade enhances Dash. Dashing into an enemy now vaults you upwards and resets dash as if you touched the ground.

FLIGHT_BURST.description: Arrow Storm recoil is increased and activates while grounded.

BRUTAL_BLOW.description: Armour Breaker now gives an extra +10% damage and has its cooldown reduced by 5s, but lasts half as long.

CULICIDAE_CREED.description: Leap becomes fully vertical, and Spectral Hover lasts twice as long.

SPLIT_SECOND.description: Aura now travels faster with Invigorating Wave unlocked, but no longer gives mana.

MOB_MENTALITY.description: Commander places puppets ahead of where you are facing.

BOUND_BY_BLOOD.description: Shadow Projection's teleport range, duration, and launch strength is doubled.

LASSO.description: Grappling Hook, War Scream, and Uproot now pull enemies with much more force.

GUNK_SHOT.description: Arrow Bomb's velocity is doubled but loses -66% radius and -20% damage.

NET_SHOT.description: Bryophyte Roots is now triggered from Buckshot, doubling its slowness and damage.

RIVER_OF_SOULS.description: Phantom Ray gains massive radius, but reduced damage by 20%.

FINAL_GAMBIT.description: When Second Chance activates, all allies within 10 blocks of you get a 20% damage boost for 15s.

SLOW_BOIL.description: Bakal's Grasp and Enraged Blow have their caps doubled, but Corruption charges 20% as fast.

STAGNANT_AIR.description: Air Shout gains doubled area and damage, but is delayed with decreased velocity and hit rate.

ONESELF_UNTO_ALL.description: Radiance's radius extends 4 blocks beyond Bash and buffs allies with your stats instead of theirs.

BATTLEFIELD_BRILLIANCE.description: Generalist instead makes your next Main Attack deal quadruple damage, followed by a tactical retreat.

ONEIRO.description: Your maximum Mana Bank is increased by 50, but your spells now charge it by -3 less per hit.

SOLAR_WIND.description: Thunderstorm disables Meteor and grants +3 thunderbolts, +3 radius and deal [neutral]100% and [thunder]110% each. Unstable now activates on Thunderstorm for 400% bonus damage.

FISSURE.description: Ice Snake moves much more slowly, but deals massive knockback, [neutral]+275%, and [water]+155%.

DISASSOCIATE.description: You can now have twice the Nightcloak Knives, but they each deal 30% less damage.

LIGHTNING_CRASH.description: Dash becomes a downward dive. Ripple has tripled height amplification and deals [neutral]250% and [thunder]100%.

CHAOS_REACH.description: Blood Sorrow spends 20 less points of Blood Pool and inflicts enemies with 0.3 seconds of Bleeding per hit, but no longer grants overhealth.

LIT_FUSE.description: Friendly Fire now works on Totem as well. When Totem's timer runs out, it explodes, firing 5 beams in all directions, each dealing [neutral]500%.

CLAMBER.description: Wall Jump becomes a sheer vertical climb.

WAVEBREAK.description:
Meteor's [earth] damage is replaced by [water] damage.
Psychokinesis can bounce up to 5 times, dealing [neutral]100% and [water]50% area damage, as well
as [neutral]200% and [water]100% direct hit damage, increasing by 10% after each bounce. Mana Bank gains 3 less mana from Meteor.

FLAIN_REMNANTS.description: Destroying a Puppet with Friendly Fire calls forth a Remnant. (Max 5) Each Remnant lasts for 20 seconds, fires an explosive tracking projectile every second that deals [neutral]95%, and increases your Main Attack damage by 15%.

ICE_STORM.description: Arrow Shield and Snowstorm's radius' increase by 6 blocks. Arrow Shield's charges are doubled, but no longer give defense.

REGICIDES_VANTAGE.description: Your deal 2% more damage for every block you are away from your target (Max 120%).

DIVINE_RIGHT.description: Your Maximum Health is reduced by 60%. For every 100 HP lost, Sacred Surge's damage is increased by 5%.

MANIC_EDGE.description: While vanished, lose 5% of your max mana per second. Surprise Strike further increases your damage by 3% per mana lost from this effect, up to 70%.

PSYCHIC_OBSESSION.description: Your Totems will now all move towards you at an increased rate, if you are using Mask of the Heretic.

BURNT_SHADOWS.description: Buried Light burns faster and is controlled by the direction you face. Enemies in the light instead take [fire]120%.

THREE_BODIES.description: Pressure grants additional effects: Bash gains +4 radius, Uppercut gains [water]+75%, and War Scream's buff gains +12s duration

COSMIC_CAPTURE.description: Meteor falls twice as fast, has +3 blast radius, and pulls enemies upon impact.

GRAND_INFLUENCE.description: While above 80% maximum health, nearby allies gain 15% increased health gain from all sources and 25% Walk Speed.

IGNITION_WHIRLWIND.description: Blazing Powder adds +8 rotations to spin attack, but lowers the damage by 75%.

INCISION_ELEGY.description: Lacerate becomes a forward-moving projectile, but no longer lunges.

OLD_SPARK.description: Whirlwind transforms into a travelling projectile, exploding on contact and knocking enemies into the air. Hold shift to rise with them.

DEATH_SENTENCE.description: Courage will immediately combust Guardian Angels, dealing [neutral]4000% and enkindling Buckshot's arrows with [neutral]20% Main Attack damage.

BLINDING_LIGHTS.description: All Ophanim orbs deal 250% damage, gain +5 Crystallize per hit, and instead orbit around you. Using Main Attack causes all orbs to travel faster.

ORBWALK.description: Lightweaver Orbs gain +1 area of effect, [neutral]20%, and [air]20%, but move slower.

UNSTABLE_REACTION.description: Judrajim no longer ramps in damage after each hit. When it expires, it releases 115% of its potential in an explosion of 20 blocks.

LIVING_MUSEUM.description: Players within 10 blocks of Mirage, Shadow, or Another Self clones will get 20% resistance, and be healed 8%, 15%, or 50% max health when the respective clone is destroyed.

STARCROSSED.description: Hitting an enemy with Haunting Memory makes it Linked. You can have up to two targets Linked at once. When one Linked enemy takes damage, the other Linked enemy takes that damage as well. Haunted Memory's duration is increased by 5 seconds and its range is increased by 10 blocks.

OUTBREAK.description: When you are within Totem range, the Totem becomes Primed, adding 4% of your Poison ID every 0.25s. Hitting a Primed totem with Uproot will create a 6 block wide poison cloud instantly dealing the stored Poison.

ENLIGHTENMENT.description: 25% chance for spells to cost no mana and instead refund 25% of their original cost.

HEROINES_BLESSING.description: Devout Union gains +25% damage redirection and +8 radius. Additionally, Enlightenment now only requires 1 broken mantle per mantle given to allies.

ELVEN_CURRENT.description: Escape can be re-cast twice in mid-air.

TORMENT_LITURGY.description: Shadow Siphon now immediately refreshes Vanish when triggered, but reduces Surprise Strike's multiplier by -30%.

BACKSTEP.description: Charge and Teleport will travel backwards.

AUBRIS_TEARS.description: Pool of Rejuvenation's range and duration are doubled, but Frog Dance deals no damage.

BLAZING_EFFIGY.description: Regeneration increases Totem's damage by [neutral]+14% [fire]+6% instead of restoring health.
